text: Being here I am enveloped by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls offer a transparent view—metaphorically and literally—into spaces of discussion, collaboration, and potential discovery. The words 'R+D' on the vibrant wall remind me that this place values exploration and the merging of ideas. I sense the quiet hum of human endeavor. I feel open to inspiration, alert to the significance of being in a space dedicated to questioning, experimenting, and pushing boundaries.
